017package org.apache.juneau.commons.utils;
018
019import java.util.*;
020import java.util.concurrent.*;
021import java.util.function.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.settings.*;
025
026/**
027 * System utilities.
028 */
029public class SystemUtils {
030
031   private static final Logger LOG = Logger.getLogger(SystemUtils.class);
032
033   /**
034    * Prevents instantiation.
035    */
036   private SystemUtils() {}
037
038   static final List<Supplier<String>> SHUTDOWN_MESSAGES = new CopyOnWriteArrayList<>();
039
040   static {
041      Runtime.getRuntime().addShutdownHook(new Thread() {
042         @Override
043         public void run() {
044            if (Boolean.FALSE.equals(Settings.get().get("juneau.shutdown.quiet").asBoolean().orElse(false))) // HTT - shutdown hook; true branch tested, false requires JVM shutdown with system property set
045               SHUTDOWN_MESSAGES.forEach(x -> LOG.info(x.get()));
046         }
047      });
048   }
049
050   /**
051    * Adds a console message to display when the JVM shuts down.
052    *
053    * @param message The message to display.
054    */
055   public static void shutdownMessage(Supplier<String> message) {
056      SHUTDOWN_MESSAGES.add(message);
057   }
058
059   /**
060    * Looks up a system property or environment variable.
061    *
062    * @param name The property name.
063    * @return A StringSetting wrapping the value.
064    */
065   public static StringSetting env(String name) {
066      return Settings.get().get(name);
067   }
068
069   /**
070    * Looks up a system property or environment variable, returning a default if not found.
071    *
072    * @param <T> The type to convert the value to.
073    * @param name The property name.
074    * @param def The default value.
075    * @return The found value, or the default.
076    */
077   public static <T> T env(String name, T def) {
078      var s = Settings.get();
079      return s != null ? s.get(name, def) : def;
080   }
081}
